title: Enderite
description: Adds a netherite type resource to the end, which makes you even stronger
body:
This mod adds Enderite which is basically Netherite for the End!

New Items are: Enderite Pickaxe, Enderite Axe, Enderite Sword, Enderite Shovel, Enderite Hoe, Part of Enderite, Enderite Ingot, Enderite Armor Upgrade Template, Enderite Tool Upgrade Template, Enderite Template Preset!

New Blocks are: Enderite Block, Compressed Ender, Beacon Base!

## Obtaining:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Mine Compressed Ender between Y25 and Y45 to get Parts of  Enderite!
Find Enderite Armor Upgrade Template and Enderite Tool Upgrade Template in End Cities you need atleast one of each after that you could duplicate them!

</details>
